title: Setting Up NOWPayments Webhooks: Everything You Need to Get Started: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: As a digital creator in Kenya, you're no stranger to the frustrations of trying to get paid through conventional payment processors. PayPal and Stripe may have worked for others, but their strict policies and geographic restrictions have blocked your path to success. You've tried everything from begging for exceptions to switching to local banks, but nothing seems to work. Meanwhile, your digital product, whether it's an ebook, course, or software, sits dormant, unable to generate the income it deserves. It's time to break free from these limited options and explore a new way to get paid. NOWPayments webhooks offer a flexible and secure solution, and with the right setup, you can start selling your digital products to customers worldwide.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

NOWPayments webhooks bypass the traditional payment processor model, allowing you to connect directly with customers and receive payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies. This flexibility is particularly useful for digital creators like yourself, who often deal with customers from around the world. By using NOWPayments, you can avoid the hassle of dealing with local banks and their often cumbersome payment systems. With webhooks, you can set up a seamless payment and delivery pipeline that works for you, not against you.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, make sure you have a few essential tools in place. You'll need a digital product to sell, such as an ebook or software, and a web presence to showcase your offering. You'll also need to integrate NOWPayments into your sales process, which can be done using their API or a platform like Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99). Additionally, you'll need to configure your payment and delivery pipeline, which involves setting up webhooks and defining the rules for automated delivery.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need to create a NOWPayments account and generate a webhook URL. You'll then need to configure your payment settings, including the cryptocurrencies you accept and the fees associated with each. Next, you'll need to define the rules for automated delivery, which determines when and how your digital product is delivered to customers after payment. This process may seem complicated, but with the right guidance, you can set it up quickly and easily.
You don't need a PayPal or Stripe account to get paid.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, you're ready to go live. You'll need to test your integration to ensure that payments are being processed correctly and your digital product is being delivered as expected. With your setup complete, you can start promoting your digital product to customers and making sales. Keep in mind that it's essential to track your sales and customer interactions to refine your process and improve your sales strategy.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your sales grow, you'll need to scale your payment and delivery pipeline to keep up with demand. This may involve upgrading your NOWPayments account or adding additional integrations to handle increased traffic. By monitoring your sales and customer interactions, you can identify areas for improvement and make data-driven decisions to optimize your process. By scaling your system, you can increase your revenue and build a sustainable business model.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Webhooks can be set up in just a few hours, bypassing traditional payment processor complexities.
